// Code generated by github.com/romshark/datapages; DO NOT EDIT.

// Package action provides generators for datastar action hypertext references.
// These references must be used in the templates.
package action

import (
	"strconv"
	"strings"
)

// POSTPagePostRate references /post/{slug}/rate/
func POSTPagePostRate(slug string, query QueryPOSTPagePostRate) string {
	var (
		scoreStr string
	)

	if query.Score != 0 {
		scoreStr = strconv.FormatInt(query.Score, 10)
	}

	anyQuery := query.Score != 0

	var b strings.Builder
	l := len("@post('/post/") + len(slug) + len("/rate/") + len("')")
	if anyQuery {
		l += len("?")
	}
	n := 0
	if query.Score != 0 {
		if n > 0 {
			l += len("&")
		}
		l += len("score=") + len(scoreStr)
	}

	b.Grow(l)

	b.WriteString("@post('/post/")
	b.WriteString(slug)
	b.WriteString("/rate/")
	if anyQuery {
		b.WriteString("?")
	}
	n = 0
	if query.Score != 0 {
		if n > 0 {
			b.WriteString("&")
		}
		b.WriteString("score=")
		b.WriteString(scoreStr)
	}
	b.WriteString("')")

	return b.String()
}

type QueryPOSTPagePostRate struct {
	Score int64 `query:"score"`
}
